blocks.content: It was later — afternoon, the light shifting — when Cassandra stared at the ceiling and said:

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: I know what you want to say.
Ethan looked up from the sketchbook he had been drawing in. A nurse had brought it from his bag in the waiting room.

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: Then you know I'm going to keep saying it until you agree.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: I'm twenty-two years old.

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: I know exactly how old you are.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: I don't want to spend the rest of my life feeling like a patient.
He set the sketchbook down.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: I know what the device means. I know why it makes sense. I just—
She stopped. Looked at the ceiling.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: I have spent my whole life being careful. Being managed. Being watched. And I don't mean by you — you have never made me feel like that. But inside. In here.
Her hand went to her chest.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: I don't want to add another thing to listen to.
He was quiet for a moment.

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: I understand that.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: Does it scare you? The idea that there might be a day you can't reach me in time?
He didn't look away.

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: Every day. Since the day you told me. But I don't live like that, Cass. I live like this — sitting next to you in this ugly hospital room, which is exactly where I want to be.
She turned her head and looked at him.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: What if it happens again?
He looked back. Not away. Not toward the window.

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: Then I want everything between now and then to be the kind of life where we didn't spend it afraid. Where we just lived it, Cass. The way you've always wanted to live it.
She looked at him for a long time.

blocks.speaker: Cassandra
blocks.content: Okay. I'll think about it.

blocks.speaker: Ethan
blocks.content: That's all I'm asking.
She reached out her hand. He took it.
Outside the window, the grey sky sat over everything.
Inside, just this.
